rationale: Author-of-record lens: commit 13788634 delivers exactly plan Bead 5 / spec R8, no more no less. All 5 prescribed steps land: (1) ms-panel-run Step 0's mkdir + hand-typed panel.json schema + reviewed_head_sha co-bump prose replaced by one `mindspec panel create <slug> --spec <id> --target <ref> [--bead <id>] [--round N]` call whose grammar matches plan Bead 4 exactly; the skill-authored '## Your job'/verdict-JSON block removed and BRIEF shrunk to filling the four stub headings; hard_block described as a top-level sibling of verdict. (2) Launch/Codex-detection/Working-dir/Slot-lens-defaults/Anti-patterns kept, and the panel.json anti-pattern re-pointed at the verb. (3) tally Steps 1-3 (Load/Tabulate/| Condition | Action | matrix) replaced by `mindspec panel tally`; stale-verdict recovery re-pointed at `panel create --round N+1`. (4) Consolidate/Artifact gates/After-a-halt/Escape hatch/Abandon all preserved. (5) runbook.md doc-sync region added. Exactly the 5 files in plan key_file_paths — no scope creep. Mirrors byte-identical; all R8 grep gates PASS on both copies; merge terminal still routes a pass through `mindspec complete` (ADR-0034). The one flagged intro-paragraph edit is a necessary accuracy fix (the old intro described the removed matrix steps), not unrequested scope.
findings: Deviation assessment (intro edit): ms-panel-tally's opening line was rewritten from 'Read *-round-N.json, summarise verdicts, apply the decision matrix...' to 'Run `mindspec panel tally` for the decision, apply the HARD artifact gates...'. This is WITHIN reason — required, not optional: leaving the old intro would have left stale prose describing the Load/Tabulate/matrix steps this bead deletes. Good judgment, not scope creep.

Non-blocking observation (frontmatter): the YAML `description:` still reads 'read all verdict JSONs, apply the decision matrix + artifact gates...'. The implementer deliberately left it untouched; the plan's Bead 5 steps do not prescribe editing it and the R8 grep gates do not touch it, so leaving it is faithful to the author-of-record mandate (editing would be unrequested scope). It stays accurate at the catalog-summary altitude (the skill remains the single decision authority); the how-level drift is cosmetic. No change required for this bead.

Verified: exactly 5 changed files, matching plan work_chunk 5 key_file_paths. Both .claude mirrors byte-identical to their plugins originals (diff -q clean). Both R8 acceptance grep one-liners exit 0 (no matrix table, no reviewed_head_sha schema key, no 'artifact-gate finding may set' phrasing; verbs referenced; Artifact gates + Slot lens defaults present). doc-sync gate passes.

Verified: panel create grammar in Step 0 (`mindspec panel create <panel-slug> --spec <spec-id> --target <ref> [--bead <bead-id>] [--round N]`) matches plan Bead 4 step 1 verbatim; Bead 4 is merged (8efaf5a0) so referenced verbs exist. Merge terminal (§ Then) still routes 'merge' through `mindspec complete <id>` — ADR-0034 constraint honored.
